glosses.ro: a da înapoi; a se retrage

sentences.target: Je recule la chaise contre le mur.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁə.kyl la ʃɛz kɔ̃tʁ lə myʁ/

translations.fr: Je recule la chaise contre le mur.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁə.kyl la ʃɛz kɔ̃tʁ lə myʁ/
translations.en: I move the chair back against the wall.
translations.es: Empujo la silla hacia atrás hasta que toque la pared.
translations.de: Ich schiebe den Stuhl nach hinten an die Wand.
translations.it: Spingo la sedia all'indietro contro il muro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把椅子往后推到墙边。
translations.yue: 我將張櫈向後推到貼住牆。
translations.ru: Я отодвигаю стул назад к стене.
translations.pt: Eu empurro a cadeira para trás até encostar na parede.
translations.he: אני מזיז את הכיסא אחורה אל הקיר.
translations.vi: Tôi đẩy ghế lùi về phía tường.
translations.ar: أدفع الكرسي إلى الخلف نحو الجدار.
translations.nl: Ik schuif de stoel achteruit tegen de muur.
translations.uk: Я відсуваю стілець назад до стіни.
translations.hi: मैं कुर्सी को पीछे दीवार की ओर धकेलता हूँ.
translations.pl: Przesuwam krzesło do tyłu pod ścianę.
translations.el: Σπρώχνω την καρέκλα πίσω προς τον τοίχο.
translations.nb: Jeg skyver stolen bakover mot veggen.
translations.id: Aku mendorong kursi mundur ke dinding.
translations.sv: Jag skjuter stolen bakåt mot väggen.
translations.da: Jeg skubber stolen bagud mod væggen.
translations.ja: 椅子を後ろに押して壁に寄せる。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st-person singular; transitive verb meaning to move something backward.
Definite article, feminine singular; marks the direct object noun.
Common noun; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for “mur”.
Common noun; object of the preposition “contre”.

sentences.target: On recule la réunion à demain.

translations.fr: On recule la réunion à demain.
translations.en: We push the meeting back to tomorrow.
translations.de: Wir verschieben die Besprechung auf morgen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把会议推迟到明天。
translations.yue: 我哋將會議延後到聽日。
translations.vi: Chúng ta hoãn cuộc họp đến ngày mai.
translations.nl: We verplaatsen de vergadering naar morgen.
translations.hi: हम बैठक को कल के लिए टाल रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi flytter møtet til i morgen.
translations.sv: Vi skjuter upp mötet till i morgon.
translations.da: Vi flytter mødet til i morgen.
translations.ja: 会議を明日に延期します。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun triggering 3rd-person singular agreement.
Present indicative, 3rd-person singular; main verb meaning to move back/postpone.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for “réunion”.
Common noun; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing the target time of the postponement.
Temporal adverb functioning as complement of “à”.

translations.en: I have to postpone my appointment.
translations.he: אני צריך לדחות את התור שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi phải hoãn cuộc hẹn của mình.
translations.el: Πρέπει να αναβάλω το ραντεβού μου.
translations.sv: Jag måste skjuta upp min tid.
translations.da: Jeg er nødt til at udskyde min aftale.
translations.ja: 予約を延期しなければならない。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st-person singular; modal auxiliary expressing obligation/necessity.
Infinitive main verb complement of “devoir”.
Possessive determiner, 1st-person singular, masculine singular.
Compound common noun; direct object of the verb.

sentences.target: Tu recules ton vélo de deux mètres.
sentences.reading: /ty ʁə.kyl tɔ̃ ve.lo də dø mɛtʁ/

translations.fr: Tu recules ton vélo de deux mètres.
translations.ipa: /ty ʁə.kyl tɔ̃ ve.lo də dø mɛtʁ/
translations.en: You move your bike back two meters.
translations.es: Mueves la bicicleta dos metros hacia atrás.
translations.de: Du schiebst dein Fahrrad zwei Meter zurück.
translations.it: Spingi indietro la tua bici di due metri.
translations.zh-Hans: 你把自行车往后推两米。
translations.ru: Ты отодвигаешь свой велосипед назад на два метра.
translations.pt: Você empurra sua bicicleta dois metros para trás.
translations.he: אתה מזיז את האופניים שלך שני מטרים אחורה.
translations.vi: Bạn đẩy chiếc xe đạp lùi lại hai mét.
translations.ar: أنت ترجع دراجتك إلى الخلف مسافة مترين.
translations.nl: Je zet je fiets twee meter achteruit.
translations.uk: Ти відсуваєш свій велосипед назад на два метри.
translations.hi: तुम अपनी साइकिल को दो मीटर पीछे खिसकाते हो.
translations.pl: Przesuwasz swój rower o dwa metry do tyłu.
translations.el: Μετακινείς το ποδήλατό σου δύο μέτρα πίσω.
translations.nb: Du skyver sykkelen din to meter bakover.
translations.id: Kamu mendorong sepedamu mundur dua meter.
translations.sv: Du skjuter din cykel två meter bakåt.
translations.ro: Împingi bicicleta ta înapoi cu doi metri.
translations.cs: Posuneš své kolo o dva metry dozadu.
translations.da: Du skubber din cykel to meter tilbage.
translations.ja: 自転車を二メートル後ろに押す。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 2nd-person singular; transitive use with a concrete object.
Possessive determiner, 2nd-person singular, masculine singular.
Common noun; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a measure complement.
Cardinal numeral specifying the length of the movement.
Common noun; unit of measure serving as complement of “de”.
